emails.subject: BNP Paribas Guaranty
emails.body: BNP Paribas Guaranty I wanted to let you know that the form of Enron Corp. Guaranty has been agreed to with BNP Paribas and has been sent up to Enron Corp. for signature today. I will send you a copy of the Guaranty once it is fully executed.
